hero.description: Passionate about building modern, scalable web applications. I bridge the gap between elegant frontends and robust backend systems.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Software Developer from Argentina focused on creating efficient digital solutions that generate a real impact on people. My practical experience centers on the comprehensive development of applications (Full Stack) using technologies such as JavaScript (React, Node.js, Express) and MongoDB, in addition to having a solid foundation in languages ​​such as Java and C++.
about.p2: My technical profile is complemented by a level of English suitable for integrating into professional environments and a strong interest in innovative fields such as Artificial Intelligence. I am currently finishing my Advanced Vocational Training in Software Development and am constantly strengthening my knowledge.
